effectEN:
Look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one unit card with grade less than or equal to your vanguard from among them, call it to (RC), and shuffle your deck.

[CONT](Deck):When you would search or choose a unit card from deck, this card may be searched or chosen.
[CONT]:When this card would be called to (RC) from deck, put it into your hand instead of putting it into the drop.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
•[Rock] Finishing Attack Type: Hitting
•Super Finishing Attack ◆ Dangun
•[Technique] 90

•[Scissors] Finishing Attack Type: Pinching
•Super Finishing Attack ◆ Kingfisher Hug
•[Technique] 90

•[Paper] Finishing Attack Type: Throwing
•Super Finishing Attack ◆ Tornado Throw
•[Technique] 90

Skill-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Skill is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 80 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Attack is Hitting - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Attack is "Dangun" - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & discard a "Super Dangun" from hand], and retire all of your opponent's rear-guards.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 80 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Pinching - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Kingfisher Hug" - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & discard a "Super Kingfisher Hug" from hand], and all of your opponent's vanguards cannot [Stand] during their next stand phase.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 80 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Throwing - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Tornado Throw" - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & discard a "Super Tornado Throw" from hand], and until end of that battle, that attacking unit can perform drive checks.
[ACT](Drop):If you have a vanguard with "Shieldfisher" in its card name, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], call this card to (RC), and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:

•Super Finishing Move: Kingfisher Hug

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.

•Finishing Move is Hitting - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Bullet" - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & discard a "Super Bullet" from hand], and retire all of your opponent's rear-guards.

•Super Finishing Move: Tornado Throw
•Technique: 90
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a grade 0 rear-guard, Soul Charge (1), choose one of your grade 0 rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: You there! If you're exhausted, eat this!

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your drop has two or more blitz orders, this unit gets [Power]+5000.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, COST  [retire this unit], choose a grade 2 blitz order without [Regalis Piece] from your drop, put it into hand, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Eat the golden sword!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), choose up to one normal order from your drop, and put it into your hand.
[CONT](RC):If you played an order this turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Tears flowed from the black dragon. Tears of crazed joy stemming from pity.

effectEN:
(A Blitz Order can only be played when you would call a guardian.)
Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. If you have three or more back row rear-guards, it gets +15000 instead of +5000.
flavorTextEN: The Lettia Great Canyon is understood to be the territory of the Sylvan Beasts.

effectEN: [ACT](Drop)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1), bind an order card from drop], call this card to an open (RC).
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose up to one card with grade equal to or less than your vanguard from among them, call it to (RC), and discard the rest.

[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if you Alchemagic an order this turn, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], until end of that battle, this unit gets [Power]+5000, and when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: Until end of turn, all of your back row rear-guards get [Power]+5000, you cannot move rear-guards to other (RC), and they cannot boost.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. Choose one of your rear-guards not being attacked, and return it to your hand.
flavorTextEN: The place it got cornered at was the usual haunt of evil spirits.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), you may discard three cards from the top of your deck.
[ACT](RC):COST  [Retire this unit], until end of turn, the next time you would Alchemagic an order and play it, you may choose not to pay all of that cost's Soul Blast.
flavorTextEN: The Wise Cube is a treasured tool that measures divine protection.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and until end of turn, this unit gets "Boost" and [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The great sage brought forth the Wise Cubes upon their death.

effectEN: Choose one of your rear-guards, until end of turn, it gets [Power]+5000 for every five cards in your drop, and if your drop has fifteen or more cards, it gets [Critical]+1.
flavorTextEN: Is it not enough? Then you should make up with this.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have a total of three or more order cards in your drop and bind zone, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (2)]!
Choose one of your opponent's vanguards, and that unit gets [Critical]-1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: A dead-end filled with despair, that no one can leave.
Pince and slice! I'll split you into two with this!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):This unit can intercept from the back row.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], choose a grade 2 or less card from your drop, call it to (RC), and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The nation where the land and sea become one. That is Stoicheia.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Retire this unit], choose two of your units, and they get [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Long ago, the land and sea had lost their powers during the era without prayers.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and until end of turn, this unit gets [CONT](Back Row RC):When this unit would attack, this unit battles all of your opponent's front row units.".
flavorTextEN: Usually well behaved. When excited, it might get a little dangerous.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your vanguard is "Sylvan Horned Beast King, Magnolia", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your rear-guards, and until end of turn, that unit can attack from the back row, and gets [Power]+5000.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit is chosen by your vanguard's effect, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll be borrowing a fragment of the king's power!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you have four or more other rear-guards, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The wise beasts understood the significance of sacrifice.

effectEN: [AUTO](Back Row RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your other rear-guards, and it gets this unit's [Power] until end of turn. (Increase its [Power] at that time)
flavorTextEN: The scholarly beasts do not shy away from cooperation.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Sylvan Horned Beast King, Magnolia", COST  [Soul Blast (1)], reveal the top card of your deck, if it is a unit card, call it to (RC), and if it isn't, put it into your hand.
[AUTO](Back Row RC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Do not fear change. Your thoughts will always remain the same.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [retire two rear-guards]!
Draw a card, put this card into your soul, and Counter Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: I don't mind dying. As long as that is killed.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (2)], this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of battle for each of your other rear-guards.

effectEN: [CONT](Back Row RC):This unit gets [Power]+10000, and if you have three or less rear-guards, all of your rear-guards in the same column as this unit cannot be chosen by your opponent's card effects. (Active on opponent's turn too)
flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/100): The multi-colored will-o'-the-wisps gathered, secretly guarding its still hidden body.
(D-PR/241): Those who incur the wrath of the foxfire will be judged by the forest without mercy.

flavorTextEN: Sometimes in battle, the winner is determined by the number of bullets.

Play this with COST  [discard an Order card from your hand]!

nameEN: Fine Drink of Abolishment for Sins

Play this with COST  [Soul Blast (1)]!
Draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for each different order card in total in your drop and bind zone. (Increase by the number of different card names)
flavorTextEN: A display of the soul's discord, the brilliance of its end.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of your turn, if you Alchemagic an order and played it or attacked a total of five or more times this turn, COST  [put this unit into your soul], and Counter Charge (1).

flavorTextEN: Pierce through with the control of the torrent.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), COST  [retire one of your rear-guards], and call up to two Plant Tokens to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: So this is Cray 3000 years later!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC) or (RC) or put on (GC), COST  [Soul Blast (1) & discard an order card from your hand], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000/[Shield]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Sink into the ocean of repentance.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Retire this unit], choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: It's fine, you'll definitely improve.

effectEN: [CONT](VC/RC):All of your other units in the same column as this unit get "Boost".
flavorTextEN: Will you, help me out? Thank you.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and call up to two Plant Tokens to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater vanguard, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for each of your token units.

effectEN:

[Glitter]-"Thegrea" (Active if your vanguard is a [Glitter] with "Thegrea" in its card name)
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle that this unit attacked, COST  [Soul Blast one or more cards], choose a card from your soul with the same grade as the sum of the grades of the cards [Soul Blast] for this cost, put it into your hand, and put this unit into your soul.
flavorTextEN: I'll become the world's number one villain!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit intercepts, COST  [discard a card from your hand], look at two cards from the top of your deck, and you may call them to (GC) or discard them.
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks a grade 3 or greater unit, if it is the fourth battle of that turn or more, this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The battle is nearing the end... which means it's my time to shine!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, this unit gets [Power]+5000 for each order card in your bind zone.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, COST  [discard an order card from your hand], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
